skills.name: Critical Element
skills.description: Increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits.

levels.description: Increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits.

skills.name: Attack Boost
skills.description: Increases attack power. Also improves affinity at higher levels.

skills.name: Weakness Exploit
skills.description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot.

levels.description: Attacks that hit weak spots have 10% increased affinity, with an extra 5% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 15% increased affinity, with an extra 15% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounded parts.

skills.name: Fire Resistance
skills.description: Increases fire resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels.

skills.name: Fire Attack
skills.description: Increases fire element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

skills.name: Jump Master
skills.description: Prevents attacks from knocking you back during a jump.

skills.name: Critical Element
skills.description: Increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits.

levels.description: Increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits.

skills.name: Mind's Eye/Ballistics
skills.description: Prevents attacks from being deflected. Also shortens the distance before ammo and arrows reach maximum power.

skills.name: Focus
skills.description: Increases the fill rate for weapons with gauges and the charge rate for weapons with charge attacks.

levels.description: Increases gauge fill rate by 5% and reduces charge times by 5%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 10% and reduces charge times by 10%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 20% and reduces charge times by 15%.

skills.name: Slinger Capacity
skills.description: Increases loading capacity for slinger ammo obtained in the field. Limits the amount of ammo used when firing certain shots.

levels.description: Increases the loading capacity for slinger ammo collected from the ground or plants.
In addition, increases the loading capacity for some slinger ammo dropped by monsters.
In addition, increases the loading capacity for all slinger ammo dropped by monsters.
Increases the loading capacity for slinger ammo collected from the ground or plants even more.
Increases the loading capacity for all slinger ammo.
